content.situation: HR在新员工报到时致欢迎辞，并提到将安排入职培训
content.speakerText: Welcome to the team! We'll walk you through the onboarding process today to help you get settled.
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎加入团队！今天我们会带你了解入职流程，帮你尽快适应。
content.responseTemplate: Thank you! I'm looking forward to ___.
content.hint: 表达对学习新工作流程的期待，常用短语是 'learning the ropes'
content.knowledgePoint: 常用职场表达：学习新技能/适应新环境

content.situation: HR向新员工说明接下来的安排，提到会提供必要资源
content.speakerText: You'll receive all the tools you need—laptop, access cards, and system logins.
content.speakerTextCn: 你会收到所有必需的工具——笔记本电脑、门禁卡和系统账号。
content.responseTemplate: That's great to hear. I really appreciate you ___ everything so organized.
content.hint: 固定搭配 'make something organized' 表示把事情安排得井井有条
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：make + 名词（表示安排/组织）

content.situation: HR在欢迎新员工时鼓励提问，并强调团队支持
content.speakerText: If you have any questions along the way, don't hesitate to ask—everyone here is happy to help.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果你在过程中有任何问题，随时提问，这里每个人都乐意帮忙。
content.responseTemplate: Thanks for saying that—I feel much more confident now that I know I can ___.
content.hint: 表达‘寻求帮助’时，职场中常用 'reach out'（主动联系）
content.knowledgePoint: 职场沟通动词短语：主动寻求支持
